title: Void Helper
description: This project adds essential utility tools for Void players, featuring Auto Bucket, No Ghost Hit, and an intelligent nearby Player/Mob counter.
body:
🌌 Void Helper
Void Helper is a client-side utility mod designed to enhance your performance and awareness in "Void" environments and competitive multiplayer servers.

🌟 Multiplayer Ready
This mod is built to work on all multiplayer servers without needing any server-side installation. It stays hidden and provides essential information and combat tweaks locally.

🚀 Key Features:
📊 Smart Entity HUD: Real-time counter for nearby Players and Mobs within a 32-block range.

🪣 Auto Bucket (Toggle): Automated high-speed clicking for Water and Lava buckets. (Press V to toggle).

🖥️ Clean UI: A fully transparent, blur-free menu that lets you see the action while configuring your HUD (Press M).

💨 Movement Tweaks: Includes No Jump Delay and Fast Stop for precise movement.

🛠 How to use:
M: Open the Configuration Menu.

V: Toggle Auto Bucket.

O: Toggle No Jump Delay.

P: Toggle Fast Stop.

Requirements: Fabric Loader & Fabric API (1.21.1).

[Discord](https://discord.gg/qKs9eex6XE)

[TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@ali_mef5m)
